assertions.title: API round-trips match store state

steps.observed: 200 with 3 assertions returned: CA-MNVTGDE4-YEGX (Feature links correctly, pending, orderIndex 0), CA-MNVTGDHD-8ZAJ (Validation passes on success, pending, orderIndex 1), CA-MNVTGDRD-QNBH (Fix feature created on failure, pending, orderIndex 2)

steps.expected: 200 with 3 validation runs ordered DESC by startedAt
steps.observed: 200 with 3 runs: VR-TEST-005 (passed, attempt 3), VR-TEST-004 (failed, attempt 2), VR-TEST-003 (failed, attempt 1). Total=3, ordered correctly

200 with run detail: status=failed, summary='Initial validation failed', includes 1 failure (VF-TEST-002): assertionId=CA-MNVTGDE4-YEGX, message='Feature link not found', expected='2 linked features', actual='0 linked features'

steps.expected: 200 with loop state snapshot for idle feature
steps.observed: 200 with snapshot: loopState=idle, implementationAttemptCount=0, validatorAttemptCount=0, validatorRuns=[], failures=[], lineage=[], retryBudgetRemaining=3
200 with rollup: totalAssertions=3, passedAssertions=0, failedAssertions=0, blockedAssertions=0, pendingAssertions=3, unlinkedAssertions=0, state=ready

steps.action: Open dashboard, navigate to Integration Test Mission, check assertions panel
steps.expected: Assertions panel shows 3 assertions matching API data
steps.observed: Assertions panel shows 'No assertions defined. Add one to define completion criteria.' — MISMATCH with API data

steps.action: Expand 'Run History Feature' (F-MNVTDH2E-YYZD) run history in dashboard
steps.expected: Run history shows 3 validation runs matching API response
steps.observed: Dashboard crashed with TypeError: 'nt.get(...)?.map is not a function' — cannot verify run history display

steps.expected: 200 with linked assertions for the run history feature

steps.observed: 200 with 2 linked assertions: CA-MNVTGDE4-YEGX and CA-MNVTGDHD-8ZAJ

evidence.consoleErrors: TypeError: nt.get(...)?.map is not a function — occurs when expanding any feature's run history. Minified stack trace at index-D73cJS2D.js:1416:94471 (tM component). ErrorBoundary catches and shows 'Something went wrong' with retry button.

assertions.issues: Two critical discrepancies found: (1) Assertions panel shows empty state despite API returning 3 assertions — the dashboard is not rendering assertion data from the store. (2) Expanding any feature's run history causes a React crash (TypeError: nt.get(...)?.map is not a function) — likely a null-safety issue in the run history component where the API returns data in a shape the component doesn't handle. Both issues prevent verifying API-to-dashboard round-trip consistency.

frictions.description: Dashboard assertions panel shows empty state ('No assertions defined') even though the API endpoint returns 3 assertions for the same milestone. The API-to-store-to-dashboard pipeline is broken for assertions display.

Expanding feature run history in the dashboard crashes the entire Mission detail view with 'nt.get(...)?.map is not a function'. The ErrorBoundary catches it but the entire page must be reloaded. This blocks verification of validation run display matching API data.
The networkidle wait event times out on the Fusion dashboard (25s timeout). Had to rely on fixed waits instead.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser wait 2000ms instead of wait --load networkidle

summary: Tested VAL-CROSS-003: API round-trips match store state. Result: FAIL. All 7 API endpoints return correct, consistent data matching the store state. However, the dashboard has two critical bugs: (1) the assertions panel shows 'No assertions defined' despite the API returning 3 assertions — the data exists in the store but is not rendered, and (2) expanding any feature's run history crashes the React app with TypeError: nt.get(...)?.map is not a function. These prevent verifying the API-to-dashboard round-trip consistency.
